scope: Add and verify a Drive-backed archive delivery, signed-link, and hosted-proof handoff after rebuild partially consumed node 149:2.
selected_figma_slice: Drive-backed archive package delivery, signed/scoped link, expired retry, hosted proof, and remote migration proof state handoff.

node_touched.name: Prototype / 20 / Drive archive delivery handoff
changes: Added state cards for credentials configured, package assembly to Drive, signed link issued, student download started, expired link retry, and hosted proof required.
Mapped archive delivery UI to /api/admin/exports/student-archive, /api/exports/:id/download, /api/student/archive/readiness, /api/evidence/drive-probe, and /admin/audit.
Mapped records ExportRequest, StudentArchiveExport, ExportArtifact, EvidenceArtifact, EvidenceRepository, AuditEvent, RetentionPolicy, UserGroupRole, RequirementProgress, and Deadline.
Recorded Cloudflare token, Google Drive credential, remote migration, and retention-policy dependencies as implementation/deployment context, not Figma blockers.

permission_scopes: admin export with reason and explicit student/program scope
program teacher readiness only unless explicit export scope exists
misc admin denied by default unless explicit export/reporting scope exists
guardrails: live Drive provider proof required before package success
remote D1 migration proof is separate from local test proof
raw Drive ids and storage keys never render to clients
expired links deny bytes and offer regeneration
every sensitive archive action writes an audit event
hosted proof uses fake .test accounts only
acceptance_checks: Drive credential probe passes before package success
remote D1 export_artifacts exists before hosted package success
package artifact or signed link has expires_at, content hash or package id, and student scope
student download, expired, denied, missing artifact, and retry paths write audit events
hosted fake-account proof verifies admin queue and student archive card
no Drive ids, storage keys, private email addresses, or fake-account shortcuts render
blockers: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN missing for remote D1 migration verification
GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY missing for live Drive delivery
school retention policy still needs Bryan confirmation before hardcoded retention values
